items.name: Rahul Sharma
items.quote: Akshay made investing feel approachable. He designed a SIP plan within our budget — within 2 years, we've already seen meaningful growth in our portfolio.

items.name: Priya Mehta
items.quote: I was confused about where to start. Akshay explained everything plainly and helped set up my first mutual fund portfolio. Quarterly reviews give peace of mind.

items.name: Anil Verma
items.quote: Planning for my daughter's education felt overwhelming. Akshay created a goal-based plan, and I finally feel confident about her future studies abroad.

items.name: Neha Kulkarni
items.quote: No hidden charges, no jargon. Disciplined, results-driven approach to portfolio management. I've referred Akshay to several friends and family.

items.name: Vikram Gupta
items.quote: Started with ₹3,000/month SIP three years ago. My corpus has grown beyond expectations. He truly understands compounding and patience.

items.name: Sunita Joshi
items.quote: Close to retirement, I needed safe yet growth-oriented planning. Akshay balanced my portfolio beautifully — I feel completely secure now.
